tested.source: DIPR Leh on Twitter: "6 new positive cases report in UT Ladakh; 23 patients cured and discharged. Total number of COVID-19 active cases in UT Ladakh has come down to 183; 151 in Leh and 32 in Kargil district. @lg_ladakh @ladags @DvCom_Secretary @sahuajeet @padmaangmo @Ravinder_Dangi1 @MoHFW_INDIA https://t.co/GKzVG6XCUn" / Twitter
